magicLink.subject: Your sign-in link — {brand}
magicLink.title: Sign in to your account
magicLink.intro: Click the button below to sign in. The link works once and expires in 15 minutes.
magicLink.linkFallback: If the button doesn't work, copy this address into your browser:
magicLink.ignore: Didn't request this? You can safely ignore this email.
magicLink.text:
Sign in to {brand}: {link}
The link works once and expires in 15 minutes.

orderReceived.subject: Order received — {brand}
orderReceived.thanksProduct: Thanks — we've recorded your order for {product}.
orderReceived.referenceNote: When you make your BCEL One transfer, include this reference in the payment note:
orderReceived.track: We confirm every payment within one business day. Track your order any time at {portalLink} — sign in with this email address, no password needed.
orderReceived.textReference: Include reference {reference} in your BCEL One transfer note.

fileReady.subject: A new file is ready for you — {title}
fileReady.title: A new file is ready for you
fileReady.text: A new file is ready for you: {title}. Open your portal: {portalUrl}
